column1: We must take a decision as _____ as possible. (quick)
Try to say that in a _____ way. (polite)
Your face is dirty. You must wash _____ . (you)
Your bike is dirty, you must wash _____ . (it)
I'll wash my bike, and you'll wash _____ . (you)
Do you prefer the _____ song or the _____ one? (one, two)
The weather has changed. It is much _____ and _____ now. (warm, sunny)
